name: Enable precision cast emulation
conditions: Numerical mismatch between eager and compiled outputs, especially fp32→fp16 conversions

name: Enable expandable CUDA memory segments
conditions: OOM errors under compile that don't happen in eager, especially with large models or fragmented memory

name: Enable scalar output capture
conditions: Errors or graph breaks involving data-dependent control flow, unbacked SymInts, or scalar outputs

name: Disable TF32 for precision
conditions: Numerical corruption in Conv2d or other CUDNN ops under compile, especially with shape padding enabled

name: Increase realize opcount threshold
conditions: AssertionError about TRITON_MAX_BLOCK exceeded, typically with large reduction ops

name: Disable DDP optimizer
conditions: DDPOptimizer + activation checkpointing not supported together

name: Suppress dynamo errors (fallback to eager)
conditions: Non-critical compilation errors where eager fallback is acceptable. Last resort workaround.

name: Enable dynamic shapes
conditions: Shape specialization causing recompilation, wrong shapes, or errors with varying input sizes

name: Run inference in no_grad mode
conditions: Inference-only model hitting autograd errors or OOM due to compile speculatively assuming backward will run

name: Rewrite multi-dim indexing
action: Replace y[0, b] with y[0][b] (chain single-dim indexing)
conditions: Export fails with multiple dimension indexing in strict=False mode

name: Explicitly compute output shapes
action: Manually calculate output shape instead of relying on implicit shape inference (e.g., F.interpolate)
conditions: Dynamic shape compile produces wrong output shapes for ops that infer shapes from input

name: Clone gradients in register_hook
conditions: Precision issues with max-autotune mode due to in-place gradient operations

name: Cast before .item()
conditions: Export fails with int(x.item()) in strict=False mode (SymFloat to Double conversion)

name: Use pytree instead of optree
action: Replace optree usage with torch.utils._pytree when code will be compiled
conditions: Graph break when Dynamo encounters optree usage — not yet supported

name: Disable autotune local cache
conditions: Stale autotune cache causing incorrect kernel selection, especially after model changes
